'''Yal-Noy''' was a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] that was located to the north of the [[Zantay Hills]]. A river fed by the mountain's snowmelt ran through the hills.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
